title: Wildfires Force Evacuation of Thousands in Southwest France
summary_full: The blaze in the Pyrenees, a region bordering Spain, has scorched more than 11,000 acres so far.
summary_public: The blaze in the Pyrenees, a region bordering Spain, has scorched more than 11,000 acres so far.
